title: Buttery White Fish Medley
description: A festive middle-eastern dish featuring white fish, dumplings and other vegetarian-friendly ingredients in a creamy, buttery sauce that's perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: In a large pot, sauté onion and garlic until translucent. Add fish fillets on one side of the pot.
Season with salt and pepper, and add sliced green peppers and zucchini. Stir in vegetable broth, paprika, thyme sprigs, and cream sauce mix to taste.
Simmer for about 15 minutes or until vegetables are tender. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Divide the mixture into four baking dishes or one large baking dish if desired. Place dumplings evenly on top of each serving.
Bake in preheated oven for about 20-30 minutes, until the sauce thickens and the dumplings are golden brown.
